spec_match.rationale: Exercises `reading-flow` and `reading-order` on a focus-trapped grid, surfacing the tab traversal order live.

interactive.rationale: Three selects drive layout and ordering; the focus walker reports each step on Tab/Shift+Tab.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Index promises a tab-walker; the page delivers.

edge_cases.rationale: Now includes a tabindex=-1 item that is skipped by sequential focus and a nested reading-flow container case. Contenteditable elements remain out of scope for this concept.

summary: Best ergonomic demo of the focus/AT impact, now with skipped tabindex and nested reading-flow coverage. Chrome DevTools MCP verified the nested case, skipped item, and grid-columns walk with a clean console.
